rulings.Case Title: NANCY MARIE SCOTT et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 15, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT CRANE CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT IN LIGHT OF THE GADD DECLARATION, THE OBJECTIONS TO WHICH ARE OVERRULED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO ENTERPRISE LIABILITY, FALSE REPRESENTATION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES. =(302/PJB/AP)
